subject: [LSF/MM/BPF TOPIC] [RFC PATCH 0/4] mm/mempolicy: introduce socket-aware weighted interleave

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Proposed a simplified approach where cpuset nodes dictate weights, which should already be the case with existing code. Suggested clarifying fallback semantics for allocation

2026-03-16.patch_summary: Proposal to introduce socket-aware weighted interleave in mm/mempolicy, considering a 2x2 situation for cpuset and multi-socket-cpu
